channel.title: +Tai on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Tai on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Tai Ahom
item.description: Pre-hindu structure jAti-s and varNa-s The Tai Ahoms royalty under Sukaphaa (1228–1268) came in with their own nobility and priestly class who were also of divine origin. Royal clans were barred from being ministers, who were themselves dominated by specific noble clans (Burhagohain, Borgohain, Borpatrogohain, Borbarua and Borphukan). “Ahom clans, called phoids, formed socio-political entities. At the time of ingress into Assam, or soon thereafter, there were seven important clans, called Satghariya Ahoms (Ahoms of the Seven Houses).
